name: Pressure Cooking Chart for Frozen Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Asparagus - 2 minutes
2. Beans, green or wax - 2 to 3 minutes
3. Broccoli - 2 to 3 minutes
4. Brussels sprouts - 21/2 minutes
5. Cauliflower - 2 minutes
6. Corn, whole kernel - 1 minute
7. Corn on the cob - 2 minutes
8. Green Peas - 1 minute
9. Lima beans - 2 1/2 to 4 minutes
10. Mixed vegetables - 2 minutes
11. Peas and carrots - 2 minutes
12. Spinach - 1 minute
